commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: CLI 自动检测 workspace — 从脚本路径或 CWD 推断

不再依赖 agent 手动 export CHAOTING_WORKSPACE。检测优先级：
1. CHAOTING_WORKSPACE 环境变量（显式设置）
2. 脚本自身路径（如果在 .chaoting/src/ 下）
3. 从 CWD 往上查找 .chaoting/src/ 目录

gateway agent 的 CWD 由 gateway 设定为 workspace 目录，
因此即使 agent 调用 repo CLI 也能正确找到 workspace DB。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[fix](trx-frontend-http): deduplicate AIS history snapshot by MMSI

AIS vessels transmit every 2-30 s; without deduplication the 24-hour ring
buffer can hold tens of thousands of entries, making the /decode/history
response huge and causing O(n^2) DOM thrashing on the client side.

- Add AIS_HISTORY_MAX = 10 000 to cap the ring buffer memory footprint.
- snapshot_ais_history() now returns the latest message per MMSI (one entry
  per vessel), sorted ascending by ts_ms so the client replays in order.

This matches APRS history behaviour: APRS stations transmit infrequently so
their history is naturally compact; AIS history is now equally compact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Stan Grams <sjg@haxx.space>

Reduce repetitive phrases in quiz explanations

Cleaned up overused phrases across all question banks while
maintaining Ms. Luminara's distinctive teaching voice:

- Removed excessive "Come closer/with me" openings
- Removed formulaic "Isn't that beautiful/exquisite?" endings
- Removed repetitive "Here's where it gets delicious/beautiful"
- Removed "Let yourself sink into this mechanism" filler
- Removed "Stay with me" and "Wait for it" interruptions
- Removed "The body does this thousands of times per second"

The explanations retain their pedagogical structure, physics-first
metaphors, and warmth - just without the repetitive scaffolding
that made them predictable. Ms. Luminara's voice is preserved
through varied phrasing.

Files modified: 31 question bank JSON files across all 7 topics

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
LR experiment: 1e-3 optimal for 4-layer model (3.3x higher than default)

Tested LR range 3e-4 to 3e-3 on 4L/dim=1024 config. 1e-3 gives 4.4% better
loss with stable activations. 2e-3 gives best loss but dangerous x magnitudes.
Updated train.py default LR from 3e-4 to 1e-3.

feat: redesign visibility (#2)

* feat: add dns/route53 to networking override and fix visibility reads

- Add setup_dns step (after setup_alb) to all three override workflows:
  deployment/initial, deployment/delete, scope/create
- Move dns/route53 directory (setup script, modules, stubs) from scopes-lambda
- Fix alb/setup and api_gateway/setup to use $VISIBILITY env var instead of
  reading capabilities.visibility directly from $CONTEXT, so that http_enabled=false
  correctly skips HTTP networking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* debug: log VISIBILITY value in networking setup scripts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: remove api gateway step from create workflow

* fix: auto-add api_gateway and alb stubs in route53 setup

Route53 modules reference api_gateway_* and alb_* locals that must
always be declared. The setup script now adds the corresponding stubs
automatically if those modules were not composed in the current workflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: run setup_dns before alb and api_gateway in networking workflows

DNS must run first to populate dns_full_domain in TOFU_VARIABLES,
which alb/setup uses as host_header. Without it, the fallback reads
scope.domain from context which may be 'To be defined' on first create.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: run setup_dns first and export DNS_FULL_DOMAIN for alb host header

DNS must run before ALB so the resolved domain is available via the
DNS_FULL_DOMAIN env var. ALB now reads it directly instead of relying
on TOFU_VARIABLES or scope.domain (which may be a placeholder on first
scope create). Also rejects scope.domain values containing spaces to
guard against platform placeholders like "To be defined".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Combine tool workflows to fix push race condition

Merges ensure-registry-id and generate-index into a single
tool-maintenance workflow that runs both steps sequentially
before doing one commit+push.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix prompt cache review feedback and add integration test suite (#46)

* Fix BOS heuristic divergence, cache_read_tokens accuracy, and None token warning

Address three unresolved PR #44 review comments:

1. Align _tokenize_for_cache BOS check with stream_generate (use `is None`
   instead of `not bos`) to prevent token sequence divergence on tokenizers
   with empty bos_token.

2. Report cache_read_tokens as prefix_len (what was matched) instead of
   suffix_start (an implementation detail of stream_generate needing ≥1
   token). Guard single-token prompts from wastefully trimming the entire
   cache — treat as miss instead.

3. Log debug warning when StreamToken.token is None instead of silently
   dropping it from generated_tokens.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add integration test suite (27 tests) exercising full HTTP request chain

Multi-layer integration tests that mock only at the MLX primitive boundary,
letting FastAPI, routers, inference engine, model manager, store, and
registry all run real. Covers:

- Prompt cache: create/hit/miss/disable/multi-turn/no-leak to Ollama+OpenAI
- Model pull: download+register, skip-if-cached, concurrent, pull→inference
- Model lifecycle: load/reuse/LRU eviction/active_refs/expiry/unload/503
- Cross-API: same output all APIs, error formats, thinking blocks
- Real-model smoke tests (@pytest.mark.real_model, skipped in CI)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR #46 review: fix shared mock, FakeTokenizer truthiness, and test assertions

- Use None sentinel for _start() replacement to avoid shared MagicMock instance
- FakeTokenizer.encode: use `bos_token is not None` to mirror inference.py fix
- test_cache_miss: invalidate cache to force true miss, assert cache_read == 0
- test_thinking_blocks: assert "thinking" block present in Anthropic response
- test_concurrent_pull: assert call_count == 1 (not <= 1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix cache_read_tokens overcount, extract _expire_stale, separate fake counters

- cache_read_tokens: use suffix_start (KV entries actually reused) not
  prefix_len which overcounts by 1 on exact-match
- Extract _expire_stale() from _check_expiry_loop so tests call real
  manager logic instead of reimplementing the loop
- Separate _generate_call_count from _stream_call_count in integration
  test fakes to prevent cross-path counter interference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Guard empty prompt_tokens, clarify patch ordering, document active_refs write

- suffix_start: guard against empty prompt_tokens with explicit `if
  prompt_tokens else 0` (unreachable today but makes intent clear)
- conftest: consolidate comment above order-dependent mlx_lm.generate
  patches explaining the constraint and consequence of swapping
- test_active_refs: document why direct active_refs write is safe in
  asyncio (plain int, no preemption points)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Fix YouTube sync delay: add 0.5s lookahead + faster polling

YouTube IFrame API getCurrentTime() lags behind actual audio
by ~200-500ms due to cross-iframe postMessage communication.
Added a sync lookahead constant to compensate, and removed the
60-250ms polling throttle for smoother chord tracking.

- C2: Modal size="xl" → does not exist, use size="lg" with scroll
- C3: Loading size="large" → use <Loading active> (88px) or <Loading active small>

MEDIUM:
- M1: OverflowMenu size="sm" → legacy, removed from docs
- M2: InlineNotification kind="ai" → kind="info" (10 occurrences in JSX)
- M3: Tag type="quantum" → type="cyan" (8 occurrences in JSX)
- M4: Button variant= → kind= (48 occurrences in JSX)

commit.message:
Fix CORS on API Gateway error responses (401/403/5xx)

Add GatewayResponses DEFAULT_4XX/DEFAULT_5XX to inject
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * on all errors returned by API Gateway
itself (Cognito authorizer 401, etc.) — prevents browser from
blocking these as CORS errors causing misleading 'Network Error'.

Fix gap filler: also trigger when streak is stale, not just missing summaries

The previous gap filler only checked if yesterday's summary existed.
If summaries existed but streak wasn't updated (from a prior buggy run),
it wouldn't trigger. Now checks both conditions.

Also relaxed idempotency guard to only block older dates, not same-date
re-processing, so manual recalculate can fix stuck streaks.
